mapper.select: SELECT id, item_code, item_spec, coin_shop, CAST(CASE WHEN item IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS INTEGER) AS has_item FROM userdb.item_box WHERE account_name = #{accountName} AND date_received IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.item_box SET date_received = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM userdb.item_box WHERE account_name = #{accountName} AND date_received IS NULL
SELECT item FROM userdb.item_box WHERE id = #{id} AND account_name = #{accountName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO userdb.item_box (account_name, item_code, item_spec, coin_shop, date_received) VALUES (#{accountName}, #{itemCode}, #{itemSpec}, #{coinShop}, NULL)
INSERT INTO userdb.item_box (account_name, item_code, item_spec, coin_shop, item, date_received) VALUES (#{accountName}, #{itemCode}, #{itemSpec}, #{coinShop}, #{item}, NULL)
